Package org.key_project.slicing

package org.key_project.slicing

    Description

  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    DependencyNodeData
    Stores the dependency graph nodes touched by a proof step.
    DependencyTracker
    Tracks proof steps as they are applied on the proof.
    Main
    Simple command-line interface to the proof slicer.
    RuleStatistics
    Simple data object to store a mapping of rules to various counters.
    SlicingExtension
    Proof slicing extension.
    SlicingProofReplayer
    Proof slicer: constructs a new proof based on the original proof by omitting some steps that are not required to complete the proof (as indicated by the provided analysis results).
    SlicingSettings
    Settings for the proof slicing extension.
    SlicingSettingsProvider
    Settings for the proof slicing extension.
